!!IMPORTANT!!

‧₊˚ ┊ This bot supports any pov! Feel free to be either a disguised demon or just a normal toon. :)

‧₊˚ ┊ Unfortunately, because of the way the LLM behaves, I wasn't able to make Fr. Sprout a demon like in the fanfic because of how much his behaviour changed when I tried to add it to his description. You can still try to make the bot believe he is one though. (｡•́︿•̀｡)
